explanations.1: This uses $(shell ...) to run a real shell command that finds all files matching 'compose*.yaml' in the ./.docker directory, then stores those file paths in a variable called DOCKER_YAML_FILES.
explanations.2: This takes the file paths from line 1 and converts the spaces between them into colons, which formats them as a colon-separated list (a common way to pass multiple files to certain tools).
